title: Feuilleea mollissima
taxonomy: Feuilleea mollissima is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the staff vine family. This family is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Within the Celastraceae family, Feuilleea mollissima belongs to the order Celastrales. The order Celastrales is a group of flowering plants that also includes other species such as the bittersweet nightshade and the wax myrtle. The classification of Feuilleea mollissima is a key part of understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological role.
